title: Fortune stones
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:FortuneStones.png|thumb|right|250px|Logray using the fortune stones]]
The '''fortune stones''' were a group of small stones which the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] used to predict the future.

Logray was asked to use the stones by [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] after a mysterious light that fell from the sky (in actuality [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]) to see if they were in danger or not. Their formation after falling onto the ground suggested that, on the day in question, a blinding flash of light will bring good fortune to them.<ref name="Droids 4">[[Droids (1986) 4|''Droids'' (1986) 4]]</ref> Later on, Logray wondered if the fortune stones had gotten the events wrong.<ref name="Ewoks 10">[[Ewoks (1985) 10|''Ewoks'' (1985) 10]]</ref>

It is speculated that the stones may have been infused with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], as they indeed gave the shaman the ability of foresight.

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 4|''Droids'' (1986) 4]]
*[[Ewoks (1985) 3|''Ewoks'' (1985) 3]] {{1st}}
*[[Ewoks (1985) 10|''Ewoks'' (1985) 10]]
